title: connection_device_id only tracks last PUBLISH_KEY_PACKAGE per connection
description: ws.rs line 850: connection_device_id is overwritten each time PUBLISH_KEY_PACKAGE succeeds. If a connection publishes for two different device_ids, only the last is deleted on disconnect. The first device's stale key package lingers in key_packages indefinitely. Fix: track a Vec<String> of all device_ids published this connection and delete all on disconnect.
